text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand images and videos. Two important tasks in computer vision are image recognition, which identifies what an object is, and object detection, which locates where objects are in an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision helps the vehicle recognize traffic signs, detect pedestrians, and avoid obstacles on the road. Other uses include security cameras that can spot suspicious activity, medical software that analyses X-rays, and smartphone apps that identify plants or animals. As technology improves, computer vision continues to make our lives easier and safer.
